differentials.name: asymptomatic (10-20%), gradual onset of dyspnea + cough
differentials.raw: asymptomatic (10-20%), gradual onset of dyspnea + cough

differentials.name: weight loss, weakness, hemoptysis, defect in diffusing capacity
differentials.raw: weight loss, weakness, hemoptysis, defect in diffusing capacity

differentials.name: Idiopathic pulmonary hemosiderosis
differentials.raw: Idiopathic pulmonary hemosiderosis (boys, symmetric involvement of mid + lower zones, progression to nodular + linear pattern)

differentials.name: Goodpasture syndrome
differentials.raw: Goodpasture syndrome (more rapid changes, renal disease)

differentials.name: Desquamative interstitial pneumonia
differentials.raw: Desquamative interstitial pneumonia ("ground-glass" appearance, primarily basilar + peripheral)

differentials.name: Pulmonary alveolar microlithiasis
differentials.raw: Pulmonary alveolar microlithiasis (widespread discrete intraalveolar calcifications primarily in lung bases, rare familial disease)

differentials.name: Bronchioloalveolar cell carcinoma
differentials.raw: Bronchioloalveolar cell carcinoma (more focal, slowly enlarging with time)
